reviews.comment:
Una buena opcion para descansar cuando se cruza el desierto.  A veces esta un poco sucio pero por la gente misma que para ahi.

(Translated by Google)
A good option for resting when crossing the desert. Sometimes it's a bit dirty, but that's because of the people who stop there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5bWNPS213RRAB

reviews.comment:
Linda estación de servicio, luego de cargar combustible me prendió el check del auto, pero cero complicaciones, los baños limpios

(Translated by Google)
Nice gas station, after filling up with fuel the car's check light came on, but no complications, clean bathrooms

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5MGNiel9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pasamos para almorzar y no tienen opciones. El empleado nos sugirió ir al comedor de a lado.
Mucha propaganda a las YPF full pero en esta esta un poco desatendida.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped by for lunch and they had no options. The employee suggested we go to the cafeteria next door. There's a lot of advertising for YPF Full stations, but this one is a bit neglected.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5a2RlMFdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Ideal para hacer un alto en el camino

(Translated by Google)
Ideal for a stop along the way
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5N3EtVWVREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy rápidos en su trabajo y excelente atencion

(Translated by Google)
Very fast in their work and excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5enB6OVl3EAE

reviews.comment:
El descanso,bien,el servicentro,bien.Los playeros de terror, demasiado lentos y hasta parece a propósito. No cargo más ahí.

(Translated by Google)
The rest stop was fine, the service station was fine. The attendants were awful, way too slow, it almost seemed like they were doing it on purpose. I'm not filling up there again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5enNDZWpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre paro acá.

(Translated by Google)
I always stop here.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5anN1QVBBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena obcion para parar y seguir, el precio de los combustibles es el de la patagonia, cuenta con un parque camping libre al lado para comer a la sombra, mirando a el río colorado.

(Translated by Google)
A great option for stopping and continuing. Fuel prices are the same as in Patagonia. There's a free camping park next door where you can eat in the shade, overlooking the Colorado River.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5d3JXazVnRRAB

Very good travel aid
